fields.Title: On the axis of one great migration
fields.Sub: Communication is migrating from dedicated silicon to general compute; wireless R&D is migrating from field trial-and-error to EM twin + AI loop. Not two things — two ends of one migration. MetaRadio stands on that axis.
fields.TeamBody: MetaRadio is an interdisciplinary team: on one end, university professors deep in electromagnetic theory and channel modeling; on the other, practitioners from leading comms and mobility companies who have shipped large-scale GPU and systems engineering. We believe the next wireless breakthrough happens precisely at the intersection of EM first principles and general-compute engineering.
fields.TeamNote: Team bios and portraits · coming soon
fields.CtaTitle: Want to know MetaRadio more deeply?

items.title: Title
items.text: On the axis of one great migration

items.title: Sub
items.text: Communication is migrating from dedicated silicon to general compute; wireless R&D is migrating from field trial-and-error to EM twin + AI loop. Not two things — two ends of one migration. MetaRadio stands on that axis.

items.title: TeamBody
items.text: MetaRadio is an interdisciplinary team: on one end, university professors deep in electromagnetic theory and channel modeling; on the other, practitioners from leading comms and mobility companies who have shipped large-scale GPU and systems engineering. We believe the next wireless breakthrough happens precisely at the intersection of EM first principles and general-compute engineering.

items.title: TeamNote
items.text: Team bios and portraits · coming soon

items.title: CtaTitle
items.text: Want to know MetaRadio more deeply?

table.Title: EM first principles × GPU engineering
table.Body: Professors from BJTU / BIT bring the first principles of electromagnetics and channels; practitioners from Samsung / DiDi / VIAVI bring GPU and systems engineering. Two kinds of DNA, one team.

table.Title: A GPU-accelerated EM compute stack from simulation to terminal
table.Body: Lauraycs (simulation) ↔ Liquid RF (terminal runtime) share one GPU-accelerated EM compute stack and AI-Native methodology — one EM reality, two infrastructures.

table.Title: R&D infrastructure + terminal connectivity platform
table.Body: Like XtalPi — R&D infrastructure for AI-for-Wireless; like Qualcomm — the connectivity platform for next-gen terminals. A hybrid model from R&D services to platform licensing.

sections.heading: Partners
bullets: Shanghai Inst. of Physical Intelligence & Robotics

fields.Title: 站在同一场迁移的轴线上
fields.Sub: 通信正从专用器件迁移到通用算力，无线研发正从外场试错迁移到电磁孪生 + AI 闭环。这不是两件事，是同一场迁移的两端——乾径站在这条轴线上。
fields.TeamBody: 乾径由一支跨学科团队组成：一端是深耕电磁理论与信道建模的高校教授，另一端是来自头部通信与出行企业、做过大规模 GPU 与系统工程的实战派。我们相信，下一代无线的突破，恰恰发生在"电磁第一性原理"与"通用算力工程"的交叉点上。
fields.TeamNote: 团队成员介绍与人像 · 敬请期待

items.title: Title
items.text: 站在同一场迁移的轴线上

items.title: TeamBody
items.text: 乾径由一支跨学科团队组成：一端是深耕电磁理论与信道建模的高校教授，另一端是来自头部通信与出行企业、做过大规模 GPU 与系统工程的实战派。我们相信，下一代无线的突破，恰恰发生在"电磁第一性原理"与"通用算力工程"的交叉点上。

items.title: TeamNote
items.text: 团队成员介绍与人像 · 敬请期待

table.Title: 电磁第一性原理 × GPU 工程能力
table.Body: 北交大 / 北理工教授团队提供电磁与信道的第一性原理，三星 / 滴滴 / VIAVI 出身的实战派提供 GPU 与系统工程能力。两种基因，一个团队。

table.Title: 贯穿仿真到终端的 GPU 加速电磁计算栈
table.Body: Lauraycs（仿真）↔ Liquid RF（终端运行时）共享同一套 GPU 加速电磁计算栈与 AI-Native 方法论——一份电磁，两端基础设施。

table.Title: 研发基础设施 + 终端连接平台
table.Body: 与晶泰同构——做 AI for Wireless 的研发基础设施；与高通同构——做下一代终端的连接平台。从研发服务到平台许可的混合模式。

table.Value: 重庆 / 东莞 / 昆山（分阶段建设）
